# Roni's Clothings

A fashion clothing retail brand inspired by the style and experience of Renuar — a well-known Israeli fashion chain. The brand likely focuses on contemporary, trend-driven apparel for everyday wear, with a clean and accessible shopping experience similar to a mid-range fashion retailer.

Source: https://roni-s-clothings.zappy5.app

---

Our Point of View

## Dressed for the LifeYou Actually Live


Modern, wearable fashion shaped by urban rhythm and clean styling — pieces that move with you from morning coffee to evening plans, without asking you to choose between comfort and elegance.










01


### Day to Evening, Effortlessly


Versatile silhouettes designed to carry you through every hour — from the desk to dinner — with nothing more than a change of attitude.







02


### Quality You Can Feel


Accessible luxury positioning means every fabric, every seam, and every detail is chosen with intention — fashion boutique online quality at a price that respects you.







03


### A Calm Shopping Experience


No noise, no pressure. Just a quiet, curated space where you can discover pieces that genuinely speak to your style — at your own pace.





Explore the Collection  →





































The Edit — New Season


## Dressed for Every Mood


Three distinct style directions for the contemporary woman — each one a world of its own.






All Courses


woman shirts



































01

### Monochrome Tailoring


Sharp geometry and restrained palette — the power of black, white, and nothing else.





02

### Weekend Layering


Relaxed silhouettes and soft textures that move with you through every unhurried moment.





03

### Workwear Confidence


Polished, purposeful dressing for the woman who leads every room she walks into.







Explore the Collection

















What Our Customers Say


## Designed for the Life You Actually Live


Roni's Clothings fits seamlessly into real routines — from morning commutes to weekend plans. Confidence, wearability, and a consistent aesthetic that never compromises.








“

I've been searching for a fashion boutique online that actually gets sustainable style — not just greenwashing. Roni's pieces feel considered, quality-made, and genuinely wearable season after season.

Got Questions?

## Frequently Asked Questions


Everything you need to know about shopping at Roni&#039;s Clothings. Can&#039;t find an answer? Reach out to us.








What sizes do you carry?




We offer an inclusive size range from XS to 3XL across all our collections. Each product page includes a detailed size guide to help you find the perfect fit. If you're ever unsure, our team is happy to assist you with personalized sizing recommendations.







How long does shipping take?




Standard shipping typically takes 5–7 business days. We also offer express shipping (2–3 business days) and overnight delivery options at checkout. Orders placed before 2 PM EST are processed the same day. You'll receive a tracking number as soon as your order ships.







What is your return and exchange policy?




We accept returns and exchanges within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unworn, unwashed, and in their original packaging with tags attached. Simply initiate a return through your account dashboard or contact our support team. Exchanges are processed within 3–5 business days of receiving the returned item.







Do you offer free shipping?




Yes! We offer free standard shipping on all domestic orders over $75. For international orders, free shipping is available on orders over  50. Join our loyalty program to enjoy free shipping on every order, regardless of the total.







How do I care for my Roni's Clothings pieces?




Each garment comes with specific care instructions on the label. In general, we recommend washing in cold water on a gentle cycle and laying flat to dry to preserve the fabric's quality and color. Avoid high heat and bleaching agents. Detailed care guides are also available on each product page.







Can I track my order in real time?




Absolutely. Once your order is dispatched, you'll receive an email with a tracking link. You can also log into your Roni's Clothings account at any time to view real-time shipping updates, estimated delivery dates, and full order history.










### Maya R.

Sustainable Fashion Enthusiast · Tel Aviv





“

I follow every trend and I still come back to Roni's. The pieces photograph beautifully, layer effortlessly, and hold their shape. It's the kind of wardrobe that just works — on screen and off.



### Noa K.

Online Fashionista · Instagram Creator





“

As someone who needs to look polished from back-to-back meetings to an evening out, Roni's is the rare brand that delivers both. Clean silhouettes, calm palettes, and everything fits true to size.



### Tamar L.

Working Professional · Haifa

The Edit

# Campaign Stories & Visual Worlds


Mood-led collections shaped by city light and quiet movement. Each season, Roni's Clothings translates the rhythm of contemporary life into refined everyday fashion — clean silhouettes, considered palette, and styling drawn from the streets we walk every day. This is fashion boutique online redefined: accessible, deliberate, and always in season.












AW 2025
City Structure








SS 2025
Soft Geometry








Resort 2025
Still Movement






















Current Collection

## Dressed inIntention


Three directions define this season at Roni's Clothings — each one a study in restraint, confidence, and the quiet power of considered dressing. Fashion boutique online, reimagined for everyday life.




01


### City Monochrome


A palette stripped to its essentials. Charcoal, ivory, and deep graphite move through the city wardrobe with architectural precision — sharp cuts, clean silhouettes, and a quiet authority that carries from morning meetings to evening streets.







02


### Fluid Office Dressing


Contemporary workwear that refuses to compromise comfort for polish. Relaxed tailoring, breathable fabrics, and refined proportions create a professional ease that feels entirely modern — structured where it matters, soft where it counts.







03


### Weekend Softness


When the pace slows, the wardrobe follows. Linen, draped knits, and unhurried silhouettes bring warmth and ease to the days that belong to you — effortless pieces that feel as considered as anything in the week's lineup.






Explore the Campaign










Campaign Collection


## Curated Looks & Style Moods


Six frames. Six feelings. Each one a story told through fabric, form, and light.





All Courses
















01
Texture speaks before words do.











02
Silhouette as a quiet statement.











03
Layering is the art of restraint.











04
Tailoring is precision made personal.











05
Movement reveals what stillness hides.











06
Confidence is always in season.







View Full Campaign










## Dress the Ordinary.Own the Moment.


There is a quiet power in knowing exactly what to wear. Roni's Clothings is built for the woman who moves through modern life with intention — choosing pieces that speak without effort, and a wardrobe that stays relevant season after season. Contemporary fashion boutique style, refined for everyday presence.








Refined style for the modern wardrobe. Curated collections that speak in quiet luxury.

## The Brand Redefining Accessible Style — Roni&#39;s Clothings

URL: https://roni-s-clothings.zappy5.app/about
Description: Meet the vision behind Roni&#39;s Clothings — a fashion-forward brand rooted in the h&amp;m fast fashion spirit of clean, wearable, and trend-driven design built for real people and real moments.

The Brand Redefining Accessible Style — Roni's Clothings
















































Skip to main content

















- Products All Courses




- Home
- Campaigns
- About
- Contact






Español


0


















Our Story

# Roni'sClothings



Roni's Clothings is a modern fashion boutique online built around one simple idea: that great style should feel effortless. Inspired by the calm sophistication of contemporary Israeli fashion retail, we curate wearable silhouettes and considered pieces that move with you — from morning to evening, season to season.


Every collection balances accessible design with quiet refinement. We believe clothing should feel personal rather than prescriptive — a wardrobe that expresses who you are without demanding attention. Clean lines, relaxed tailoring, and honest materials define everything we bring to the floor.



### Trend-Aware. Built to Last.


We track the direction of contemporary fashion without surrendering to it. Each piece is chosen for its longevity as much as its relevance — so your wardrobe stays current without constant replacement. Style that endures is style that matters.


Explore the Collection




















What We Stand For

## The Principles That ShapeEvery Piece We Create







01

### Thoughtful Style


We believe that getting dressed is an act of intention. Every silhouette, fabric, and detail is considered with care — designed to feel as deliberate as it looks. Our collections are built around pieces that work together, season after season, without chasing noise.







02

### A Responsible Mindset


Fashion should leave room for the future. We source with awareness, produce with restraint, and make choices that reflect a longer view — because style and responsibility are not opposites. They are the same conversation, held honestly.







03

### Confidence for Real Life


Our clothes are made for routines that matter — the commute, the meeting, the evening that turns into something unexpected. Roni's Clothings is a fashion boutique online and in store built for real women, real moments, and the quiet confidence that comes from wearing something that simply fits.


















The Creative Process

## How Each Collection Comes Together


From the first spark of inspiration to the final edit, every Roni's Clothings collection is shaped by a quiet, deliberate process — four stages that transform an idea into the clothes you wear every day.





All Courses











01




### Inspiration


Each season begins with a mood — a feeling drawn from art, architecture, travel, or the quiet details of daily life. Our creative team gathers references, colour impressions, and cultural signals that will quietly guide every decision that follows. This is where the collection finds its emotional core.








02




### Fabric Direction


Material choices define how a garment lives in the world. We source fabrics with care — considering drape, weight, texture, and longevity. Whether it is a fluid jersey for everyday movement or a structured weave for a considered layering piece, the fabric must honour both the mood and the woman wearing it.








03




### Silhouette Refinement


Once fabric and feeling are aligned, we refine the shapes. Proportions are tested on the body, not just on paper. Hemlines are adjusted, sleeves are reworked, and ease is calibrated until each silhouette feels effortless. This stage is where our fashion boutique sensibility meets the discipline of true craft.








04




### Final Styling Edit


The last stage is an act of editing — removing what is unnecessary and strengthening what remains. Pieces are styled together, colour stories are balanced across the range, and the collection is seen as a whole for the first time. What reaches the floor is intentional, cohesive, and ready to be worn.


















Behind the Collections

## Where Ideas Become Garments


Every piece in our fashion boutique online begins long before it reaches the floor. Our studio is a living archive of moodboards pinned with seasonal palettes, afternoon fittings where silhouettes are refined stitch by stitch, texture studies laid across raw tables, and quiet campaign preparations that shape how each collection is ultimately seen. This is the atmosphere that breathes life into Roni's Clothings — deliberate, considered, and always in pursuit of the right feeling.










































Refined style for the modern wardrobe. Curated collections that speak in quiet luxury.

Need Help?


## Frequently Asked Questions


Everything you need to know about shopping with Roni's Clothings — from your first browse to your latest look.





All Courses











01


### How does shipping work, and when can I expect my order to arrive?


We ship to all major destinations with care and precision. Standard delivery typically arrives within 3–5 business days, while express options are available at checkout. Every order is carefully packaged to ensure your pieces reach you in perfect condition — because how your clothes arrive matters just as much as how they look.







02


### How do I find out about new store openings and locations near me?


Roni's Clothings is always growing. Our store network expands regularly across the country, bringing the full fashion boutique experience closer to you. To stay informed about new openings, we recommend following our social channels and signing up for our editorial newsletter — where location announcements are always among the first things we share.







03


### Where can I learn about upcoming collections and campaign launches?


Each season we introduce new collections through curated editorial campaigns — think lookbooks, styling stories, and behind-the-scenes glimpses of how each piece comes to life. Campaign launches are announced first through our newsletter and social platforms, so those who follow us closely always get an early look at what's coming next.







04


### How do I choose the right size when shopping online?


Getting the fit right is everything. Each product page includes a detailed size guide with measurements for chest, waist, hips, and length to help you make a confident decision. If you're between sizes or unsure about a specific style, our team is always happy to offer personal guidance — because great style starts with a perfect fit.







05


### How can I reach the Roni's Clothings team for further assistance?


Our customer care team is here to help with anything from order inquiries to styling advice. You can reach us through the contact form on this page, via email, or by visiting any of our retail locations. We aim to respond to all messages within one business day, because every conversation matters to us.









Still have questions? Reach out to us directly — we&#039;d love to hear from you.







Refined style for the modern wardrobe. Curated collections that speak in quiet luxury.

Español








# Return Policy


Last Updated: 5/25/2026



At Roni's Clothings, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: [business_email]


Phone: [business_phone]


Address: [business_address]






Refined style for the modern wardrobe. Curated collections that speak in quiet luxury.

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://roni-s-clothings.zappy5.app/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy




































The Edit — New Season


## Dressed for Every Mood


Three distinct style directions for the contemporary woman — each one a world of its own.







Español


0









All Courses











# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  5/25/2026



Roni's Clothings ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Roni's Clothings

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

Three distinct style directions for the contemporary woman — each one a world of its own.

All Courses











# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  May 25, 2026



Roni's Clothings is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Roni's Clothings

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.









Refined style for the modern wardrobe. Curated collections that speak in quiet luxury.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  May 25, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Roni's Clothings

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Fashion & Apparel provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Roni's Clothings provides Fashion & Apparel through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Roni's Clothings. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Roni's Clothings

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
